mapper.select:
select a.item_cd ,a.item_name ,a.item_type_cd ,a.spec ,a.qty ,a.in_price ,a.supply_price ,a.vat_price ,a.in_yn ,a.pur_order_id ,a.pur_order_item_id from tb_pur_order_item a WHERE a.pur_order_id IN
#{id}

select a.pur_order_date ,a.seq ,a.delivery_date ,dbo.getCustomerName(a.customer_cd) as customer_name ,a.item_type_cd ,a.customer_cd ,a.area_cd ,a.storage_cd ,dbo.getStorageName(a.storage_cd) as storageName ,a.remark ,a.manager_id ,a.customer_manager_name as customerManagerName ,a.vat_type ,dbo.getUserName(a.manager_id) as manager_name ,isnull(a.mail_yn, 'N') as mail_yn ,isnull(a.print_yn, 'N') as print_yn ,isnull(a.end_yn, 'N') as end_yn ,a.pur_order_id from tb_pur_order_mst a where a.pur_order_id = #{purOrderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.tb_pur_order_mst ( pur_order_date, seq, area_cd, storage_cd, customer_cd, item_type_cd, manager_id, delivery_date, customer_manager_name, remark, vat_type,reg_id, reg_dt, upd_id, upd_dt ) VALUES ( #{purOrderDate}, #{seq}, #{areaCd}, #{storageCd}, #{customerCd}, #{itemTypeCd}, #{managerId}, #{deliveryDate}, #{customerManagerName}, #{remark}, #{vatType},#{userId}, GETDATE(), #{userId}, GETDATE() )

INSERT INTO dbo.tb_pur_order_item ( pur_order_id, item_cd, item_name, item_type_cd, spec, qty, in_price, supply_price, vat_price, in_yn, etc, reg_id, upd_id )VALUES
( #{item.purOrderId}, #{item.itemCd}, #{item.itemName}, #{item.itemTypeCd}, #{item.spec}, #{item.qty}, #{item.inPrice}, #{item.supplyPrice}, #{item.vatPrice}, COALESCE(#{item.inYn}, 'N'), #{item.etc}, #{userId}, #{userId} )

INSERT INTO dbo.tb_pur_order_item ( pur_order_id, item_cd, item_name, item_type_cd, spec, qty, in_price, supply_price, vat_price, in_yn, etc, reg_id, upd_id )VALUES ( #{purOrderId}, #{itemCd}, #{itemName}, #{itemTypeCd}, #{spec}, #{qty}, #{inPrice}, #{supplyPrice}, #{vatPrice}, COALESCE(#{inYn}, 'N'), #{etc}, #{userId}, #{userId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE dbo.tb_pur_order_mst SET pur_order_date = #{purOrderDate}, seq = #{seq}, area_cd = #{areaCd}, storage_cd = #{storageCd}, customer_cd = #{customerCd}, manager_id = #{managerId}, delivery_date = #{deliveryDate}, customer_manager_name = #{customerManagerName}, remark = #{remark}, vat_type = #{vatType}, mail_yn = COALESCE(#{mailYn}, mail_yn), print_yn = COALESCE(#{printYn}, print_yn), end_yn = COALESCE(#{endYn}, end_yn), upd_id = #{userId}, upd_dt = GETDATE() WHERE pur_order_id = #{purOrderId}
mapper.select: select a.pur_order_id ,sum(a.qty) as totOrderQty ,sum(a.supply_price) as totSupplyAmt ,sum(a.vat_price) as totVat ,sum(a.supply_price)+sum(a.vat_price) as totAmt from tb_pur_order_item a where a.pur_order_id = #{purOrderId} group by a.pur_order_id
mapper.update:
update tb_pur_order_mst set mail_yn = 'Y' where pur_order_id in
#{id}

UPDATE m SET m.end_yn = 'Y' ,m.upd_id = #{userId} ,m.upd_dt = getDate() FROM tb_pur_order_mst m JOIN ( SELECT pur_order_id FROM tb_pur_order_item GROUP BY pur_order_id HAVING COUNT(*) = COUNT(CASE WHEN in_yn = 'Y' THEN 1 END) ) i ON m.pur_order_id = i.pur_order_id where m.pur_order_id = #{purOrderId}
